win_condition: Build all 6 Canal sections and survive until the end of the current round
message: Legacy of Yu is a solo campaign game. Win by building all 6 Canal sections and surviving through the end of that round. Lose if the Flood reaches an unbuilt Canal section or passes the board, if 7 Barbarians gather along the top of the board, or if you must destroy a Townsfolk Card but have none left.
